nasb.text: For a complete destruction, one that is decreed, the Lord God of hosts will execute in the midst of the whole land.

esv.text: For the Lord God of hosts will make a full end, as decreed, in the midst of all the earth.

cnv.text: 主萬軍之耶和華必在全地之中，作成已定的毀滅之事。

ccb.text: 因为主——万军之耶和华必按所定的在整个大地上施行毁灭。

csbs.text: 主万军之耶和华必在全地中施行所注定的灭绝。
